title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at GAIL India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at GAIL India
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!
